bird.name: 阿拉伯喜鹊
bird.summary: 阿拉伯喜鹊（學名：Pica asirensis）是沙特阿拉伯阿西尔省特有的一种喜鹊属鸟类。阿拉伯喜鹊曾被认为是欧亚喜鹊的一个亚种，但系统发生学研究表明其应当独立成种。 参考资料

locations.name: Asir Mountains
locations.summary: The Asir Mountains (Arabic: جِبَال عَسِيْر, jibāl ʿasīr; Arabic pronunciation: [d͡ʒɪbaːl ʕasiːr] ('Difficult')) is a mo…

relations.subject: 阿拉伯喜鹊
relations.evidence: It is only found in the country's southwestern highlands, in the Asir Mountains

relations.subject: 阿拉伯喜鹊
relations.evidence: | work=Handbook of the Birds of the World Alive | publisher=Lynx Edicions | url=https://www.hbw.com/node/60754 | access-date=20 July 2018 |url-access=subscription }} This species is highly threatened by habitat destruction, as its native forests are not regenerating
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 阿拉伯喜鹊
relations.evidence: Tourism development and climate change are also posing a threat
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
